channel.title: Notes on Home
channel.description: Recent content in Notes on Home

item.title: C Programming Language
item.description: Haven’t figured out how git submodules work yet, but as soon as I do check out my repo with the book’s exercises Sources C Programming: A Modern Approach Second Edition by K. N. King Chapter 2: C Fundamentals Chapter 2.1: A Bad Pun program #include <stdio.h> int main(void) { printf("To C, or not to C: that is the question.\n"); return 0; } Compiling and linking ❗️ I have an M2 MacBook, and I use gcc to compile c code

item.title: Linear Algebra
item.description: Link to pdf file My notebook.pdf for this course Course Description
